description: Validation-driven threshold sensitivity analysis for closed-loop A* path planning on predicted traversability grids.
safety_selection_metric_definition: success_rate_collision_free - (path_found_rate - success_rate_collision_free); rewards collision-free paths and penalizes found paths that collide.

models.name: oracle_gt
models.description: A* on ground-truth traversability mask; upper-bound reference.

models.name: rgbd_concat_baseline
models.description: Strict RGB-D concatenation baseline from step 3.

models.name: semantic_clean
models.description: Clean RGB-D semantic bottleneck from step 4.

models.name: semantic_quant8_ft
models.description: 64x 8-bit semantic tensor after clean initialized channel fine-tuning.

models.name: semantic_noise05_ft
models.description: 64x 8-bit semantic tensor with Gaussian channel noise after fine-tuning.

models.name: semantic_dropout10_ft
models.description: 64x 8-bit semantic tensor with 10% semantic feature dropout after fine-tuning.
